footer.disclaimerText: Rahvana is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice. All information provided is for educational purposes only and should not be construed as legal advice. Immigration laws are complex and subject to change. For legal guidance specific to your situation, please consult a licensed immigration attorney. Use of this platform does not create an attorney-client relationship.

courierRegistration.subtitle: Complete registration guide and secure security questions management for your US Visa appointment.

descriptions.signup: Follow these steps to create and access your account.
descriptions.profile: Complete your personal profile and preferences.
descriptions.application: Follow these steps to start and fill your visa application.
descriptions.groupRequest: Detailed instructions for creating a group visa request.

s1.title: 1. Initiate Signup
s1.desc: Navigate to the portal and click the 'Sign up now' link at the bottom of the login panel.

s2.title: 2. Account Details
s2.desc: Provide a unique username and a strong password (at least 8 characters, include letters, numbers, and symbols).

s3.title: 3. Email Verification
s3.desc: Enter your email address and click 'Send Verification Code'.
s3.note: Check your inbox (and spam folder) for a 6-digit code. Enter it into the portal and click `Verify Code` to proceed.

s4.title: 4. Personal Information
s4.desc: Input your legal Given Name and Surname as they appear on your passport.

s5.title: 5. Security Questions
s5.desc: Select three distinct security questions from the dropdowns and provide answers. You MUST remember these for future logins. We are providing facility to remember your security questions.

s6.title: 6. Finalize Signup
s6.desc: Review all fields and click 'Create'. Solve the visual captcha if prompted to complete the registration.

s7.title: 7. Now Login to your account
s7.desc: Now login to your account using your username and password. Captcha will be required for login.

s8.title: 8. User Details & Security Questions
s8.desc: Fill in your profile details and set up your security layer.
s8.usernameDesc: Your pre-filled username will appear here otherwise fill your username.
s8.q1Desc: Answer to the security question 1. If you do not remember your security questions then go to
s8.continue: Click on Continue button to proceed.

s9.title: 9. Agree & Continue
s9.desc: Read and agree to the terms and conditions and click on Continue button to proceed.

s1.title: 1. Passport Name Match
s1.desc: Verify that your First Name and Last Name match your passport. These fields are locked once you move forward.

s2.title: 2. Contact Details
s2.desc: Enter your 'Contact Email' where you wish to receive updates. Your 'Primary Email' is pre-filled from your registration.

s3.title: 3. Language and Location
s3.desc: Choose your 'Preferred Language' and the 'Country' you are applying from using the dropdown menus.

s4.title: 4. Submit Profile
s4.desc: Click the 'Submit' button to save your profile information.

s1.title: 1. Start Application
s1.desc: Now you will see a screen; click the 'Start Application' button located at the top left to begin your visa process.

s2.title: 2. Applicant Details
s2.desc: Review and complete the following mandatory fields:
s2.country: Country from which you are applying:
s2.name: First Name & Last Name:
s2.birthDesc: Select your birth country from the dropdown.

s3.title: 3. Contact Information
s3.desc: Provide accurate contact details for visa correspondence:
s3.phoneDesc: Enter your numbers without the country code.
s3.emailDesc: Verify the email address is correct for receiving alerts.

s4.title: 4. Mailing Address
s4.desc: Enter your current residential or mailing address (Street, City, State/Province, and Zip Code).

s5.title: 5. Passport Details
s5.desc: Enter your document information with extreme care:
s5.pasportDesc: Enter the number exactly as it appears.

s6.title: 6. Finalizing Application
s6.desc: Complete the last few fields and submit:
s6.idDesc: Enter your National ID number (Citizenship ID) exactly as it appears on your identity document.
s6.review: Review all the information carefully to ensure there are no errors.
s6.submit: Finally, click the 'Submit' button to proceed with your application.

s1.title: 1. Initiate Group Request
s1.desc: Identify the 'Create Group Request' option in the sidebar navigation and click it to begin.

s2.title: 2. Group Information
s2.desc: Provide general details about your travel group:
s2.name: Group Name:
s2.nameDesc: Enter a unique name for your group.
s2.dateDesc: Use the calendar or type in MM/DD/YYYY format.
s2.reasonDesc: Briefly explain the purpose of the group trip.

s3.title: 3. Contact Details
s3.desc: Enter both Local and U.S. based contact information:
s3.addressDesc: Where the group will be staying.

s4.title: 4. Embassy & Submission
s4.embassyDesc: Select the relevant office from the dropdown.
s4.submitDesc: Click the 'Next' button to proceed with the request.

set1: What is your mother's maiden name?
What was the name of your first/current/favorite pet?
What elementary school did you attend?
What is the name of the town/city where you were born?
set2: What is the name of the road/street you grew up on?
What is your least favorite food?
What was the first company that you worked for?
What high school did you attend?
set3: Where did you meet your spouse?
What is your sibling's middle name?
In what city or town was your first job?
What is the name of a college you applied to but didn't attend?

hero.subtitle: Secure, personalized, and NVC-ready. Managing your case files has never been this smart.

about.title: What is the Document Vault?
about.description: The Document Vault is your secure, intelligent workspace for managing the complex documentation required for U.S. immigration (Family-Based Visas like IR-1, CR-1, IR-5).
folderCons: You must figure out what's needed

vaultPros.title: Smart Scenarios:
vaultPros.desc: Automatically adjusts your checklist for prior marriages, military service, and joint sponsors.

vaultPros.title: Active Tracking:
vaultPros.desc: Alerts you before certificates get expired.

vaultPros.title: NVC Standard:
vaultPros.desc: Organizes your files in an easy, readable format by automatically renaming each document for clarity.

personalization.title: Smart Personalization
personalization.description: Generates a custom checklist based on your visa category (IR-1, CR-1, etc.) and personal history.

tracking.title: Expiration Tracking
tracking.description: Automatically tracks validity for documents like Police Certificate, Passport etc. Never miss a renewal.

exports.title: NVC-Ready Exports
exports.description: One-click export creates perfectly organized files, simplifying the individual upload of each document to CEAC.

coverage.title: Complete Coverage
coverage.subtitle: The Vault organizes every document according to your case category.

step1.title: Personalize
step1.description: Tell the Vault your visa type and background (e.g., prior marriages). It instantly builds your required document list.

step2.title: Collect & Upload
step2.description: Use our built-in wizards to learn how to get documents like NADRA Birth Certificates, then upload scans directly.

step3.title: Review Progress
step3.description: The system checks your progress and alerts you to missing items or expiring certificates.

step4.title: Export Package
step4.description: When ready, download a ZIP file containing all your documents, renamed and organized for easy upload.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Common questions about security and submissions.

questions.a: Absolutely. We prioritize your privacy. All your documents are securely stored in our database using advanced encryption protocols. Your sensitive data remains protected and accessible only to you.

questions.q: What if I don't have a document yet?
questions.a: No problem. You can mark it as 'Missing' or leave the slot empty. The progress bar will reflect your current status, helping you focus on what's left to do.

questions.q: Why does it say my Police Certificate is expiring?
questions.a: For U.S. immigration, Pakistani Police Certificates are generally considered valid for only 1 year from the date of issuance to the interview date. We track this automatically to prevent delays.

questions.q: Does this submit documents to NVC for me?
questions.a: No. The Document Vault is a preparation and organization tool. It helps you organize and prepare your documents efficiently. You will still need to upload the final files to the CEAC portal yourself.

cta.title: Ready to organize your case?
cta.subtitle: Stop guessing. Start building your perfect application package today.

birth-cert-beneficiary.name: Birth Certificate
birth-cert-beneficiary.description: Official birth certificate with English translation

step1.title: Obtain Original Birth Certificate
step1.description: Visit NADRA office or apply online to get your original birth certificate (Form-B or computerized NICOP/CNIC with date of birth).
tips: Ensure the certificate shows your full name exactly as in your passport
If name differs from passport, get a name match certificate

step2.title: Get English Translation
step2.description: If certificate is in Urdu, get it translated by a certified translator.
tips: Translator must certify that translation is accurate

passport-bio.name: Passport Biographical Page
passport-bio.description: Clear scan of the passport page with photo and details

police-cert-pakistan.name: Police Character Certificate (Pakistan)
police-cert-pakistan.description: Police character certificate from all districts of residence

photos-us-spec.name: US Visa Specification Photos
photos-us-spec.description: Photos meeting US visa requirements (2x2 inches, white background)

nikah-nama.name: Nikah Nama (Marriage Certificate)
nikah-nama.description: Original Nikah Nama with English translation

step1.title: Locate Original Nikah Nama
step1.description: Find your original Nikah Nama document issued at the time of marriage.
tips: Must be signed by Nikah Registrar
Should have serial number and registration details

step2.title: Get Certified Translation
step2.description: Get a certified English translation of the Nikah Nama.

step1.title: Check Passport Validity
step1.description: Ensure your passport is valid for at least 6 months beyond your intended travel date.
tips: If passport expires soon, renew it before uploading
Scan the biographical page (page with photo and details)

step2.title: Scan Biographical Page
step2.description: Scan or take a clear photo of the biographical page of your passport.
tips: Save as PDF or high-quality JPG

step1.title: Scan Both Sides of CNIC
step1.description: Make clear scans or photos of both front and back of your CNIC.
tips: If expired, renew at NADRA office
Combine both sides into one PDF file

divorce-decree-beneficiary.name: Divorce Decree / Talaq Nama
divorce-decree-beneficiary.description: Official divorce decree with translation if prior marriage

step1.title: Obtain Divorce Certificate
step1.description: Get certified copy of divorce decree from Family Court or Union Council.
tips: Court-issued decrees must be certified copies
Union Council certificates should have registration number

step2.title: Get English Translation
step2.description: If document is in Urdu, get certified English translation.

death-cert-prior-spouse.name: Death Certificate of Former Spouse
death-cert-prior-spouse.description: Death certificate if prior spouse is deceased

step1.title: Download Form I-864
step1.description: Download the latest version of Form I-864 from USCIS website.
tips: Always use the latest version of the form
Fill out completely - no blank fields

step2.title: Complete and Sign
step2.description: Fill out all sections accurately and sign the form.
tips: Use your legal name as it appears on tax returns
Sign and date - signature must be original

tax-returns-petitioner.name: IRS Tax Returns (3 years)
tax-returns-petitioner.description: Federal tax transcripts or returns for last 3 years

step1.title: Request IRS Tax Transcripts
step1.description: Order tax transcripts from IRS website or by mail.
tips: Tax transcripts are preferred over returns

employment-letter.name: Employment Verification Letter
employment-letter.description: Letter from employer confirming employment and salary

step1.title: Request Letter from Employer
step1.description: Contact your HR department to request an employment verification letter.
tips: Letter must be on company letterhead
Include: job title, salary, start date, employment type (full-time/part-time)
Should be dated within 6 months of submission

pay-stubs.name: Recent Pay Stubs
pay-stubs.description: Most recent 6 pay stubs or pay statements

w2-forms.name: W-2 Forms
w2-forms.description: W-2 forms for last tax year

communication-evidence.name: Communication Evidence
communication-evidence.description: Chat logs, call records, emails demonstrating ongoing relationship

joint-financial-docs.name: Joint Financial Documents
joint-financial-docs.description: Joint bank accounts, property, insurance, etc.

step1.title: Apply at Local Police Station
step1.description: Visit your local police station or apply through NADRA for a police clearance certificate.
tips: Valid for 1 year from issue date

step2.title: Get English Translation
step2.description: If certificate is in Urdu, get certified translation.

court-records.name: Court Records
court-records.description: Records of any arrests, convictions, or court proceedings

medical-exam-ds2019.name: Medical Examination (Form DS-2019)
medical-exam-ds2019.description: Medical examination report from panel physician

step1.title: Schedule Medical Exam
step1.description: Book appointment with panel physician approved by U.S. Embassy Islamabad.
tips: Schedule only after receiving interview date
Bring passport, photos, and vaccination records
Exam includes physical, blood tests, and X-ray

step2.title: Collect Medical Report
step2.description: Pick up sealed medical report - DO NOT OPEN
tips: Report is sealed and must remain sealed

polio-vaccine-cert.name: Polio Vaccination Certificate
polio-vaccine-cert.description: Official International Certificate of Vaccination (issued within last 12 months)

step1.title: Visit Government Hospital or Health Office
step1.description: Get a fresh dose of Oral Polio Vaccine (OPV) from any government-approved vaccination center or hospital.
tips: Must be recorded on the official Yellow Card or NADRA system
Make sure the date of vaccination is within 1 year of your travel date

step2.title: Get NADRA Immunization Certificate
step2.description: If vaccinated through the official system, you can also download a computerized certificate from the NADRA website.
tips: NADRA certificate is more professional and widely accepted
Keep both original and computerized copy

step1.title: Get Compliant Photos
step1.description: Get 2x2 inch photos that meet U.S. visa photo requirements.

translator-certification.name: Translator Certification
translator-certification.description: Certification statement from translator for all translated documents

ds-260.name: Form DS-260
ds-260.description: Online Immigrant Visa Application confirmation page

i-130-approval.name: Form I-130 Approval Notice
i-130-approval.description: USCIS approval notice for Form I-130

nvc-fee-receipts.name: NVC Fee Payment Receipts
nvc-fee-receipts.description: Proof of payment for NVC processing fees

step1.title: Obtain Matric Certificate
step1.description: Get your original Matriculation certificate from respective board.
tips: Must be original or certified copy
Get English translation if in Urdu

step1.title: Collect Degree and Transcripts
step1.description: Get both the degree certificate and detailed transcripts.
tips: HEC attestation recommended for foreign use
English translation required if in Urdu

professional-certificate.name: Professional Certifications
professional-certificate.description: Professional certifications and licenses (e.g., ACCA, CA, PMP)

step1.title: Get HEC Attestation
step1.description: Apply for HEC attestation through HEC website or office.
tips: Required for foreign use of Pakistani degrees
Apply online first, then visit HEC office

step1.title: Request Experience Letter
step1.description: Get a formal experience letter from each employer.
tips: English translation required if in Urdu

salary-slips-pakistan.name: Salary Slips (Pakistan)
salary-slips-pakistan.description: Recent salary slips from Pakistani employment

step1.title: Request NOC from Employer
step1.description: Get No Objection Certificate from current employer.
tips: Required for some government or sensitive positions
Should state no objection to visa issuance

step1.title: Get EOBI Certificate
step1.description: Obtain EOBI certificate if you have EOBI registration.

previous-visa-stamps.name: Previous Visa Stamps
previous-visa-stamps.description: Scans of previous visas in passport

travel-history.name: Travel History Record

step1.title: Collect Old Passports
step1.description: Gather all previous passports showing travel history.

travel-itinerary.name: Previous Travel Itineraries
travel-itinerary.description: Previous flight itineraries or boarding passes

step1.title: Scan Driving License
step1.description: Get clear scans of your Pakistani driving license.

step1.title: Obtain Domicile Certificate
step1.description: Get your domicile certificate from the district administration.

nicop-cnic.name: NICOP/CNIC with Photo
nicop-cnic.description: NICOP or CNIC with clear photo

property-ownership-docs.description: Property deeds, registry papers, fard documents

step1.description: Gather all property ownership documents.

bank-assets-pakistan.description: Bank account statements, fixed deposit certificates

prior-visa-denials.name: Prior Visa Denial Letters
prior-visa-denials.description: Letters explaining prior visa denials (if any)

immigration-court-docs.name: Immigration Court Documents
immigration-court-docs.description: Any prior immigration court proceedings or removal orders

arrival-departure-records.name: Arrival/Departure Records (I-94)
arrival-departure-records.description: I-94 records from previous US visits

step1.title: Get FBR Tax Returns
step1.description: Download your tax returns from FBR portal.

step1.title: Get Affidavits from Witnesses
step1.description: Request affidavits from friends/family who can attest to your marriage.
tips: Describe how they know the couple

step1.title: Collect Name Change Documents
step1.description: Get all legal name change documentation.

guardianship-docs.description: Legal custody or guardianship documents for minors

social-media-list.description: List of social media platforms used in last 5 years

step1.description: Create a list of all social media platforms you've used.
tips: Include platforms: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, etc.

social-media-screenshots.description: Screenshots of social media profiles (if requested)

step1.title: Collect Utility Bills
step1.description: Gather recent utility bills showing your address.

step1.title: Get Rent Agreement
step1.description: Ensure you have a valid rental agreement.

post-office-box-proof.description: PO Box rental receipt or ownership proof

q1.q: How does Rahvana help simplify my visa journey?
q1.a: Rahvana acts as your personal digital guide, breaking down the complex U.S. immigration process into clear, manageable steps. We combine expert-level roadmaps (specific to your location) with AI-powered tools to automate paperwork, track timelines, and prepare you for your interview, reducing the stress and uncertainty of doing it alone.

q2.q: Is the Roadmap tailored for the Islamabad Embassy?
q2.a: Yes! Rahvana includes specific guidance for Pakistan, including NADRA document requirements, Union Council registrations, local police certificate procedures, and IOM medical exam details specific to Islamabad, Karachi, and Lahore.

q3.q: Can Rahvana really auto-fill my USCIS forms?
q3.a: Absolutely. Our AI 'Brain' takes your profile data and maps it directly onto official USCIS PDFs like the I-130 and Form I-864, generating a perfectly filled, compliant form in seconds, ready for your review and submission.

q4.a: No, Rahvana is an educational AI assistant designed to simplify your journey. While we provide expert-level guidance and tools, we are not a law firm. We always recommend consulting a licensed attorney for complex legal cases.

q5.q: How accurate is the Interview Prep Question Bank?
q5.a: Our bank contains 50+ real-world questions reported from the Islamabad Embassy, with suggested answers and tips on how to present your case honestly and effectively based on successful approval historical data.

q6.q: Is my document data secure in the Vault?
q6.a: Yes. We use bank-level encryption (AES-256) to secure your files. For Free users, progress is stored locally in your browser. Plus users benefit from secure, encrypted cloud synchronization across all devices.

ivTool.title: IV Scheduling Status Tool
ivTool.subtitle: Check when your immigrant visa interview might be scheduled

description.p1: The Immigrant Visa (IV) Scheduling Status Tool shows when the National Visa Center (NVC) is scheduling interviews at specific U.S. embassies or consulates. Interviews are scheduled based on the date your case became "documentarily complete" (when you paid all fees and submitted required documents).
description.p2: Important: Interviews can only be scheduled if a visa is available. For preference visa cases, check the monthly Visa Bulletin to confirm visa availability.

overview.title: Pakistan Birth Certificate Guide (Union Council & NADRA)
overview.description: The Birth Certificate is an official civil document issued by local Union Councils or NADRA in Pakistan. It serves as primary evidence of birth and is required for legal, educational, and immigration purposes (USCIS, NVC, etc.).
overview.legalBasis: Issued under the Births and Deaths Registration Act and NADRA Ordinance 2000. Punjab CM Policy 2026: Free registration up to 7 years late.
overview.validityNote: Computerized certificates (CBRC) have no expiry but must reflect the latest NADRA record.

specialNote.title: Punjab Promotion
specialNote.description: Registration and computerized certificates are currently FREE in Punjab for up to 7 years late (CM Policy).

whatsThis.heading: Welcome to Birth Certificate Guide
whatsThis.description: The Birth Certificate is an official civil document issued by local Union Councils or NADRA in Pakistan. It serves as primary evidence of birth and is required for legal, educational, and immigration purposes (USCIS, NVC, etc.).
quick_instructions: Select the reason for your request and who the certificate is for
Choose the current age to help us determine the correct process and requirements.
Provide the information where the birth took place.
Get a tailored roadmap + checklist (what to request, verify, and upload).
Validate the final certificate before submission.
whatsThis.disclaimer: This wizard provides general guidance. Requirements vary by province and Union Council. Always verify with local authorities.

documentNeed.title: Application Setup
documentNeed.description: Help us customize the process by telling us a bit about your situation.

questions.title: What bringing you here?
questions.description: Select the option that best describes your current requirement.

options.title: New Registration
options.description: First-time CBRC registration at Union Council.

options.title: Correction
options.description: Fixing errors in existing birth records.

questions.title: Select the person's current age:
questions.description: Age group determines biometric requirements and late registration rules.

options.title: 0 to 3 Years
options.description: No biometrics/photo required at NADRA. Infants under 3 only need parent presence.

options.title: 3 to 10 Years
options.description: Photo mandatory; iris optional at advanced centers.

options.title: 10 to 18 Years
options.description: Full fingerprints, photo, and iris are all mandatory.

options.title: 18 Years & Above
options.description: Full biometrics required. Family linkage verification option available till Dec 2026.

questions.title: Where did the birth occur?
questions.description: Documentary proof varies based on birth location.

options.title: Hospital
options.description: Hospital discharge or birth notification slip is required.

options.title: At Home
options.description: Affidavit signed by parents and 2 witness CNICs required.

options.title: Overseas
options.description: Requires Embassy S-1 form or consulate birth notification.

options.title: Adoption
options.description: Legal court guardian orders are mandatory for registration.

onsitePhases.title: Gather Evidence
onsitePhases.description: Collect mandatory proofs for your specific age group and birth setting. Original CNICs of parents and Nikah Nama are essential. Vaccination cards or hospital slips should be gathered if available.

onsitePhases.title: Union Council (CBRC)
onsitePhases.description: Visit your local Union Council or Municipal Corporation. Submit the application form along with required documents. Pay the applicable fee. Wait for the processing and pick up your computerized birth certificate (CBRC).

onsitePhases.title: NADRA B-Form
onsitePhases.description: Present the UC CBRC at a NADRA Registration Center. Complete the biometric process for the child. Pay the NADRA fee (Normal Rs. 50 / Urgent Rs. 500). Receive the token.

onsitePhases.title: Collection
onsitePhases.description: Track your application status via 1777 or SMS. Visit the NADRA center to collect the final B-Form or CNIC. Verify all details and spellings on the document immediately.

onlinePhases.title: Pak-ID Registration
onlinePhases.description: Create an account on the Pak-ID Mobile App. Digital app submission is only available in selected Punjab districts. If your district is not covered, you must visit your local Union Council in person. Check app availability for your area before proceeding.

onlinePhases.title: Digital Application
onlinePhases.description: Enter family details and upload scanned copies of required documents like hospital slip or affidavit. Submit for initial digital verification. Note: Even after digital submission, a Union Council visit may still be required for in-person verification in some districts.

onlinePhases.title: Fee Payment
onlinePhases.description: Pay the application fee online using a debit/credit card. Review your application summary for accuracy.

onlinePhases.title: Digital Issuance
onlinePhases.description: Once approved, download the digital CBRC. For the NADRA B-Form, visiting a NADRA Registration Center for biometrics remains mandatory regardless of digital submission method.

documents_checklist.label: Parents' CNIC / NICOP (Valid)
documents_checklist.description: Originals of both parents required for verification

documents_checklist.label: Nikah Nama Copy
documents_checklist.description: Proof of parents' marriage — relationship verification

documents_checklist.label: Proof of Residence
documents_checklist.description: Utility bill, tenancy agreement, or domicile certificate

documents_checklist.label: Hospital Discharge / Birth Notification Slip
documents_checklist.description: Required only for hospital births — primary evidence of birth

documents_checklist.label: 2 Witness CNICs
documents_checklist.description: Required only for home births — witnesses must be non-relatives

documents_checklist.label: Affidavit (Sworn Statement)
documents_checklist.description: Mandatory for home births or late registration; signed by both parents

documents_checklist.label: Grandparent's CNIC (Conditional)
documents_checklist.description: Required only if parent's CNIC is unavailable, or for identity verification in specific districts — not a standard requirement

validation.title: Certificate Validation
validation.description: Ensure your certificate meets international standards and immigration requirements.

uploadSection.title: Review your Document
uploadSection.description: Upload a scan of your CBRC for automated field verification.

tips: Always get a Computerized UC Certificate first.
Punjab registration is free up to 7 years late.
Keep hospital slips safe; they are primary evidence.
pitfalls: Applying at NADRA without UC computerized certificate.
Missing witness CNICs for home birth registration.

tips: Union Council (UC) registration is mandatory FIRST — NADRA B-Form cannot be issued without a valid UC CBRC.
Required documents: Hospital birth slip, parents' CNIC/NICOP copies, Nikah Nama, proof of residence, and affidavit for home births.

Punjab: Digital registration via Pak-ID app available in selected districts. Sindh: Uses CRMS (Civil Registration Management System). KPK: Integrated with LG&RDD. Balochistan, GB, AJK, ICT: Manual UC registration required — no digital option.
Executive NADRA processing (Rs. 500) delivers B-Form in 3–5 days instead of 10–15.
Verify all name spellings and dates on the spot at the UC before leaving — corrections later require a separate process.
pitfalls: Digital app submission (Pak-ID) is only available in selected Punjab districts — a Union Council visit may still be required for in-person verification even after digital submission.
Grandparent's CNIC is NOT a standard requirement — it is only needed if the parent's CNIC is unavailable or for verification in specific districts. Do not gather it unless specifically requested.
Leaving the UC counter without verifying the digital entry — errors are much harder to correct after the fact.
Going to NADRA directly without first obtaining the UC Computerized Birth Certificate (CBRC) — NADRA will reject the application.

tips: Cross-check CBRC with Passport application details.
Attestation by MOFA is usually required for international use.
pitfalls: Manual handwritten certificates are NOT accepted for visas.
